title: 10 best herbal tinctures for swollen gums
description: Sweet cicely tinctures helps with swollen gums because of its potent anti-inflammatory properties. The herb's active compounds, such as apiol and myristicin, work to reduce swelling and pain in the gums by inhibiting the production of pro-inflammatory enzymes. Additionally, sweet cicely has antimicrobial properties that help combat gum infections and promote a healthy oral environment. As a result, regular use of sweet cicely tinctures can effectively alleviate swollen and painful gums...
